panels.description: Recent request-correlated logs. Use the dashboard variables to filter by request ID, Discord user ID, and whether debug logs should be included.

targets.expr: {app="arbiter", level!~"${excluded_levels:raw}"} | json | requestId =~ "${request_id:raw}" | discordUserId =~ "${discord_user_id:raw}" | line_format "requestId={{.requestId}} discordUserId={{.discordUserId}} flow={{.flow}} transport={{.transport}} level={{ if eq .level \"10\" }}trace{{ else if eq .level \"20\" }}debug{{ else if eq .level \"30\" }}info{{ else if eq .level \"40\" }}warn{{ else if eq .level \"50\" }}error{{ else if eq .level \"60\" }}fatal{{ else }}{{ .level }}{{ end }} msg={{.msg}}"

panels.title: Request ID Trace

panels.description: Volume of logs grouped by the bound flow label. This is the fastest way to see which bot workflow is active or noisy.

targets.expr: sum by (flow) (count_over_time({app="arbiter", flow!="", level!~"${excluded_levels:raw}"} | json | requestId =~ "${request_id:raw}" | discordUserId =~ "${discord_user_id:raw}" [$__interval]))

panels.title: Logs by Flow

panels.description: Volume of logs grouped by transport type such as chat input, button, modal, listener, or task.

targets.expr: sum by (transport) (count_over_time({app="arbiter", transport!="", level!~"${excluded_levels:raw}"} | json | requestId =~ "${request_id:raw}" | discordUserId =~ "${discord_user_id:raw}" [$__interval]))

panels.title: Logs by Transport

panels.description: Warn, error, and fatal logs. This is the main triage panel when a flow misbehaves.

targets.expr: {app="arbiter", level=~"warn|error|fatal"} | json | requestId =~ "${request_id:raw}" | discordUserId =~ "${discord_user_id:raw}" | line_format "flow={{.flow}} transport={{.transport}} requestId={{.requestId}} discordUserId={{.discordUserId}} msg={{.msg}}"

panels.title: Errors and Warnings

panels.description: Recent structured bot activity with flow and transport context. Useful for seeing what the bot is doing even when there is no error.

targets.expr: {app="arbiter", flow!="", level!~"${excluded_levels:raw}"} | json | requestId =~ "${request_id:raw}" | discordUserId =~ "${discord_user_id:raw}" | line_format "flow={{.flow}} transport={{.transport}} level={{ if eq .level \"10\" }}trace{{ else if eq .level \"20\" }}debug{{ else if eq .level \"30\" }}info{{ else if eq .level \"40\" }}warn{{ else if eq .level \"50\" }}error{{ else if eq .level \"60\" }}fatal{{ else }}{{ .level }}{{ end }} requestId={{.requestId}} discordUserId={{.discordUserId}} msg={{.msg}}"

panels.title: Recent Bot Actions
